---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-26T23:05:07.471406.
:::

## Current milestone

v1-corpus-frozen-annotation-forward-reprocess

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Model reliability | Human reliability | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 2 | complete | complete |
| `hitler` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 8 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 8 | complete | complete |
| `lincoln` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | complete | absent | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | complete | complete |
| `napoleon` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 9 | complete | complete |
| `x-case` | comparative-protocol-draft | comparative-guardrails-defined | not-applicable | not-applicable |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | comparative-protocol-draft |

## Model-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `napoleon` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Human-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `lincoln` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `napoleon` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Notes

The four historical case corpora are frozen as the v1 working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. MIPVU lexical-unit worklists are generated for every v1 document. Lincoln now has a complete Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU review and reliability gate; American Revolution and Napoleon worklists are committed and await review; Hitler worklists are generated locally but gitignored because they tokenize local fair-use German source text. Wholesale redownload, starter-corpus replacement, and source expansion are out of scope for the annotation-forward reprocess unless a specific source defect is found. Remaining v1 work includes source-language MIPVU review for comparator cases, human review of Lincoln's Codex-assisted decisions before publication-grade reliability claims, CMT/Koenigsbergian annotation generation, comparator case support ratings, and promotion of public findings.
